summary: Backend-only testing complete for the Bill Splitter FastAPI service. Created /app/backend/tests/test_billsplitter_api.py with 19 pytest tests covering /api/health, /api/login (success, wrong password, unknown user, validation, case-insensitivity), JWT structure (HS256 + user_id + username claims), /api/calculate (auth, invalid token, classic Alice/Bob split, business rules, pydantic validation), and DB seed (bcrypt hash verified via direct Postgres query). All 19 tests passed against http://localhost:8001. Admin auto-seeded; password_hash starts with $2b$. No backend bugs found.

minor.issue: /api/calculate only allows POST (returns 405 for GET) - this is correct behaviour, no fix needed; just noting.

critical_code_review_comments: Security: CORS is configured with allow_origins=['*'] (CORS_ORIGINS='*' in .env). Acceptable for current JWT-in-Authorization-header design (allow_credentials=False), but for production tighten this to explicit origins.

Security: No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/login. The playbook hint mentions 5-fail lockout - this is NOT implemented. Original problem statement does not require it, so reporting as enhancement only.

Auth design: This implementation uses JWT in Authorization Bearer header (not httpOnly cookies). Playbook hint about httpOnly cookies does not apply here; the spec explicitly requested JWT response with access_token in body, which is implemented correctly.
DB pool: SimpleConnectionPool is not thread-safe under high concurrency. For Uvicorn with workers/threads, consider ThreadedConnectionPool. Functional under current single-worker setup.
JWT: 'sub' claim is set to user_id (UUID string) - good. JWT_EXPIRE_MINUTES=1440 (24h) is reasonable. HS256 signing verified.
Seed admin (_seed_admin) is idempotent and self-heals on password change - verified by code review (main.py:45-58).
Pydantic: total_days validated 1..31, total_bill > 0, roommate days >= 0 and <= total_days enforced, total_days_present > 0 enforced. Good coverage.

Minor: percentage is rounded to 4 decimals (e.g., 66.6667). If frontend expects 2 decimals (66.67) per problem statement, consider round to 2. Currently sums of amount still equal total_bill within 0.01 tolerance.
seed_data_creation: None - relied on auto-seeded admin user from backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at /app/backend uses new package layout (app/main.py exposed via server.py). All 19 API tests pass. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_billsplitter_api.py is the regression suite - run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Postgres DSN from env DATABASE_URL (defaults to local billsplitter db). JWT design: token in Authorization Bearer header, NOT cookies. If frontend testing is requested next, the static HTML is at /app/frontend/public/index.html and posts same-origin to /api/login then /api/calculate.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found; all features in the requested test list pass.
